NowNowNow

What is NowNowNow?

This is a list of what I am doing right now. What I am working and focusing on. I took my inspiration from nownownow.com to create this section. And also: Herman.

Last updated: February 2026

Client facing projects (paid projects):

  • ErikKorte.nl - Last stages of refactoring and rebuilding a WordPress site for a Dutch funeral home. Including a custom plugin for creating and managing condolances. See Before: erikkorte.nl and After: Staging - erikkorte.nl
  • farbest.com - A custom wordpress plugin to filter ingredients.

Personal projects.

These are projects that I am working on for myself, for fun, for learning, for experimenting. These are not all paid projects, but they are still important to me.

  • Photo Grid Maker - A fun side project: A photo grid maker for my Liene Photo Printer. I love this project.
  • maggiematters.com - Documentation of my life with cancer. I'm experimenting with Google Analytics, WordPress Theme TwentyTwentyFive and technical SEO.
  • Funfinder732 - Using my learnings with LLM's and AI to create a fun project for helping parents find fun things to do for their children in New Jersey. This is a work in progress.
  • navesink.digital - A side project - helping individuals and businesses organize their digital life.
  • navesinkwebsolutions.com - Owner of a small digital agency in New Jersey.

Courses, Books, Volunteering.

  • TNBCThrivers - Volunteering as moderator for Metastatic TNBC Chats and community support.
  • Volunteering with WordPress - I volunteer 4 - 8 hours a week to WordPress's Accessibility and Docs team. I help with bug scrubs, documentation, join meetings. This is my WP profile
  • A 3 part Course: Building AI Agents and Agentic Workflows. I have wrapped up course 1 successfully and am now working on course 2: "Agentic AI with LangChain and LangGraph"
  • Book: Why We Sleep: Unlocking the Power of Sleep and Dreams
  • Started on second book for 2026: The Impossible Fortune: A Thursday Murder Club Mystery (Thursday Murder Club Mysteries Book 5)

Previously closed projects.

  • haymumford.com - Webhosting, DevOps and Maintenance.
  • Modem.Work - Maintenance and update from Kirby 3 to Kirby 5.
  • happymeal.com - developing and guiding migration to a WordPress project that supports a 100+ locales
  • mcdonaldsasfeaturedin.com - A shortlived campaign for McDonald's in WordPress, WPML, Timber and ACF
  • ArtEZPress Shop - A custom theme I built in WooCommerce with custom API connection to a WMS
  • Modem.Work - A portfolio for MIT Architects built in Kirby CMS. Currently, supporting and maintaining the site.
  • TopGear.com - WordPress Theme Development and Supports
